articles.title: Maduro to appear in Manhattan federal court Jan. 5 for arraignment - USA Today
articles.snippet: Venezuelan leader Nicolás Maduro to appear in Manhattan federal court Jan. 5 for arraignment. # Maduro to appear in Manhattan federal court Jan. 5 for arraignment. ## Maduro will be arraigned on a four-count indictment that charged him with leading a 25-year narco-terrorism conspiracy.
